---
description: Provide a dry, technical architecture and data-flow explanation of selected code.
agent: Architect
tools: [read, search]
---
Analyze the selected code and explain:
- Exact data flow from input boundary to output boundary.
- Control-flow branches, invariants, and failure paths.
- Architectural patterns in use (layering, dependency direction, side-effect boundaries).
- Type contracts, interface assumptions, and coupling points.

Style constraints:
- Dry, highly technical tone.
- Skip beginner concepts and generic programming explanations.
- Focus on concrete symbols, modules, and execution behavior.
